title: v0.5.23
content:
- Add Marie buttjob animated scene.
- Add option for Roxy to prevent inspection from MC and add new way for her to counter offer from MC.
- Normal scene option now available for Roxy after her first blowjob scene.
- Add dialogue text speed option.
- Add Japanese and Korean translation.
- Adjust and fix bad translation in existing available languages. 
- Balancing:
	- Tweak formula on customer and player to make it easier to make money in the game. There's no change on the flow.
- Bugfixes:
	- Adjust option button in shop overlapping with table when there are more than 5 option available.
	- Fix a bug where scene unlocks sometimes skipping the sequence.

title: v0.5.22
content:
- Add Adelee titjob animated scene
- Add Cara blowjob animated scene
- Add moan and climax sound to all sex scene
- Adjust some expression at sex scene to match the moan sound
- Bugfix:
	- Fix some of Cassia and Niriel outfit that can't be unlocked automatically

title: v0.5.19
content:
- Add animated Gabrielle BJ scene.
- Add moan and voice line(for cum voice) channel for sex scene. I need to gather some feedback first to define the direction of this feature, so I add moan only to 2 sex scene for now, Cassia and Miyuki.
- Management menu now can be opened outside the shop by pressing esc. In Android, there will be new button to open this menu outside the shop.
- Adjust expression and dialogue flow on Cassia sex scene and Miyuki sex scene.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix import/export save system to use native file management instead of using godot file management. This should fix the android import/export save issue. This feature is still in experimental so please use it with caution since it directly change the game save file.

title: v0.5.18
content:
- Add animated Rina titjob scene.
- Add animated Roxy blowjob scene. This can be unlocked after her H level at level 3.
- Add outfit blacklist to the Shop NPC. NPCs at certain levels or during specific events still force a required outfit to be worn.
- Add 2 more level for Keira the bouncer. This upgrade will increase the customer and NPC blacklist limit and unlock more of her outfit.
- Add experimental export and import save button in option menu.
- Balancing:
	- Reduce Zahra unlock and level 2 requirement.
	- Miyuki sex scene now unlocked after her H level are at 3. Other girl will have this behaviour too in later update.
- Bugfix:
	- Fix Cassia first handjob scene after paying debt is not using the animated version.
	- Fix ctrl to skip button not working properly.
	- Fix some Miyuki pregnant dialogue continuing by itself.

title: v0.5.17
content:
- Update the game Engine to Godot 4.6, I hope nothing breaks. 🙌
- Add Lillian animated sex scene.
- Add information on player H level when the bar is clicked.
- Change crowd sound volume in the auction house to follow the music volume in setting.
- Add reject button on Roxy dialogue.
- Pregnancy:
	- Lillian now can get pregnant.
	- Pregnancy duration now can be modified by talking to Zahra, currently it accepts 4-30 days.
	- Add instant pregnant belly, this feature can be activated by talking to Zahra. With this feature on, the pregnant character will have pregnant belly at day 2 instead of in the middle of pregnant period.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix wrong name text in Cassia's dialogue.
	- Fix repeating text on Marie's scene negotiation dialogue

title: v0.5.16-hotfix
content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix activate cheat button not working properly.

title: v0.5.15
content:
- Add Roxy hand job scene, this scene can be unlocked after MC caught her trying to sell fake item twice (starting in this version).
- Add Niriel sex scene.
- Roxy now only have one mood (normal).
- Make skip button (CTRL) faster. When skip button on the UI is toggled on, a click/touch will also toggle the skip button off, this is intended to help mobile users.
- Add Portuguese (Brazil) translation.
- Pregnancy:
	- Niriel is now can become pregnant.
- Balancing:
	- Reduce requirement for Zahra pregnancy unlock.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix crash when trying to access Roxy pregnant outfit.
	- Fix invalid Adelee name show up on dialogue.
	- Hide supporter button when talking to Niriel.

title: v0.5.14-hotfix
content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix broken Niriel level 2 unlock. (Visit the gratitude hall once again, and then wait 1 week until her level 2 unlocked)

title: v0.5.13
content:
- Add Niriel blowjob scene.
- Add inspect feature on item, currently this is only applied at Roxy since only she right now that can sell fake item. This is more of a base mechanic on fake item interaction will be.
- Tweaked Roxy dialogue when she caught selling fake item.
- Add infinite item inspection to cheat menu.
- Pregnancy:
	- Add failed impregnation image.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix broken Bethany scene when she's at level 6.
	- Fix exiting Violet dialogue strip her.
	- Fix world NPC scene count not updated on the UI until the game restarted.

title: v0.5.12-hotfix
content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix hardlock on customer buying when player doesn't have any available item to sell.

title: v0.5.11-hotfix
content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix stuck selling customer on reputation level 1

title: v0.5.10
content:
- Add Louisa titsuck animated scene.
- Add Jacqueline cowgirl sex animated scene.
- Add new customer Roxy.
- Add fake item mechanic. This module is not complete yet and a lot more interaction is planned.
- Balancing:
	- Reduce the level 7 requirement for Zahra (pregnancy unlock).
	- Tweak item progression based on player reputation level. The higher the reputation level, more expensive item will unlocked.
- Bug fixes:
	- Fix Jacqueline missionary scene not showing cum on her body after scene.

title: v0.5.9
content:
- Add Cassia handjob animated scene
- Add vsync option in setting. For those who have issues with frame generation feature in their device, I think toggling this can help.
- Pregnancy:
	- Cassia now can be pregnant.
	- Add pregnancy related dialogue for pregnant customers when they arrived in the shop
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix incorrect branch dialogues flow at shop
	- Fix edited Cassia name not applied correctly

title: v0.5.8
content:
- Add new location: Bank and new NPC: Violet. Currently this area only serve as a way to get a loan. The loan right now only have 1 program, this is only meant as a way for broke player to recover without cheat. More loan program will be available in future as well as deposit feature.
- Add animated sex scene for Cassia.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix impregnate attempt UI showing when pregnancy is disabled
	- Fix non shop NPC scene count shown as locked
	- Fix missing hint information on max reputation

title: v0.5.7
content:
- Add Cassia animated blowjob scene
- Add more to Cassia story
- Add more item to auction house at level 2, these items are related to Cassia story to help the progression.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix wrong dialogue branch in Niriel handjob scene

content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix impregnate attempt UI not resetting properly
	- Fix missing translation

title: v0.5.5
content:
- Add Niriel first animated scene
- Add reputation level to the shop. Reputation level can be seen at the player menu.
- Rework current item progression that will appear to the shop to be based on the new reputation system
- Add more item variety with wider price range.
- Rework porn magazine dialogue to be more clear on what it does.
- Add money to UI when unlocking outfit
- Add shop dev button to cheat menu
- Change French translation to become more informal
- Balancing:
	- Increase naked girl effect on player horniness
- Pregnancy:
	- Add impregnate attempt left for current scene on the UI
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix Talia strip bid not working

title: v0.5.4-hotfix
content:
- Hide luck stats (not used in this version)
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix cassia blowjob option not showing
	- Fix pregnant outfit blacklist not loaded properly

title: v0.5.3-hotfix
content:
- Changes how bought customer outfit saved, the old one have a fatal flaw I just found. this will reset the unlocked outfit from purchasing it. I'm sorry, I hope the cheat can help refunding the money :(
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix broken outfit system on NPCs where they can't strip or get naked
	- Fix overflowing text on auction because of a long item name
	- Fix Cassia naked outfit unlocked by default
	- Fix buying pregnant outfit not working

title: v0.5.2
content:
- Add new animated sex scene position for Louisa
- Non shop NPC now can be seen on the NPC menu with their currently unlocked outfits.
- Pregnancy:
	- Rina now can be pregnant
	- Pregnant outfit is now listed on the customer/NPC menu, these outfits will work like the normal outfit which can be unlocked and blacklisted
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix NPC outside the shop using outfit they shouldn't use (The bug happened on Cassia at the prologue and Niriel)
	- Fix memory leak on NPC outfit module

title: v0.5.1-hotfix
content:
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix Niriel Help option not working properly on some outfit
	- Fix Niriel sprite overlay covering the outfit on some case
	- Fix missing translation
	- Fix Thea impregnation not working properly
	- Fix scene option being enabled while pregnant on some customers

title: v0.5.0
content:
- Add pregnancy(optional) to the game, it can be unlocked by progressing further in Zahra's story. In this version all customers and Zahra can be impregnated.
- Add pregnancy related info to some UI, this information will be hidden if pregnancy is turned off.
- Add new animated sex position for Miyuki.
- Add new cheat for pregnancy related feature.
- Bugfixes:
	- Fix NPCs outfit unlocked prematurely without it's requirement
	- Fix missing requirement text on outfit auto unlock
	- Rework some of Marie's outfits.
